'''vayoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iframe|iframe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iframe|iframe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vayoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væyeketh|væyeketh]] || [[word:væyekej|væyekej]] || [[word:væyekesh|væyekesh]] || [[word:væyeke|væyeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vayoyokoth|vayoyokoth]] || [[word:vayoyokoj|vayoyokoj]] || [[word:vayoyokosh|vayoyokosh]] || [[word:vayoyoko|vayoyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vayokoth|vayokoth]] || [[word:vayokoj|vayokoj]] || [[word:vayokosh|vayokosh]] || [[word:vayoko|vayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vayofkoth|vayofkoth]] || [[word:vayofkoj|vayofkoj]] || [[word:vayofkosh|vayofkosh]] || [[word:vayofkof|vayofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vayokotho|vayokotho]] || [[word:vayokojo|vayokojo]] || [[word:vayokosho|vayokosho]] || [[word:vayokoko|vayokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vayokoth|vayokoth]] || [[word:vayokoj|vayokoj]] || [[word:vayokosh|vayokosh]] || [[word:vayoko|vayoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vayokothol|vayokothol]] || [[word:vayokojol|vayokojol]] || [[word:vayokoshol|vayokoshol]] || [[word:vayokokol|vayokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vayokothotho|vayokothotho]] || [[word:vayokojojo|vayokojojo]] || [[word:vayokoshosho|vayokoshosho]] || [[word:vayokoko|vayokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vayokothon|vayokothon]] || [[word:vayokojon|vayokojon]] || [[word:vayokoshon|vayokoshon]] || [[word:vayokokon|vayokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vayokothoro|vayokothoro]] || [[word:vayokojoro|vayokojoro]] || [[word:vayokoshoro|vayokoshoro]] || [[word:vayokokoro|vayokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
